title: Admin Interface to Manage Premium Plan Assignments
story: As a DataTools Pro admin, I want to assign premium plan types (free, pro, enterprise) to specific customers, so that I can grant enterprise feature access for evaluation or paid accounts.
description:
## Behavior
Admin interface at `/admin/plans/manage-premium-type` provides:
- Search and select users by email or name
- Assign premium types (free, pro, enterprise) to user teams
- View all users with premium access with total count
- Reset premium users back to free tier

## Integration
Premium feature visibility is also managed via PostHog feature flags. Both the admin interface and PostHog must be configured to grant enterprise access.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can search users by email or name
Admin can assign free/pro/enterprise plan types
Admin can view and manage all premium users
Admin can reset users to free tier
ux_changes: New admin page at /admin/plans/manage-premium-type for managing plan assignments.
middleware_changes: Admin-only access control on the premium management endpoints.
data_model_changes: Premium type assignments stored on user team plan records.
implementation_notes: PostHog feature flags are also used for enterprise feature visibility. Both the admin interface and PostHog need to be configured together.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the admin interface with user search, plan assignment, premium user list, and reset capabilities. PostHog integration for feature visibility also documented.
